name: Project Scaffolder
description: Generates the boilerplate project structure: folder layout, tooling config, and initial README. Demonstrates RETRY behaviour — the first pass is coached to add missing containerisation.

checks.pass: ✅ TypeScript config found — TS boilerplate will extend it
checks.fail: ⚠️  No tsconfig.json — will scaffold a fresh TypeScript config
❌ No Dockerfile — container packaging is missing from the scaffold

checks.prompt: Generate a minimal app boilerplate scaffold plan for a TypeScript Node.js project. List exactly 5 files to create (path + one-line description). Context: {retryContext}
checks.fail: ⚠️  Scaffold plan could not be generated
